solution: 
```java
class LUPrefix {

    private int[] uploaded;
    private int longestPrefix;

    public LUPrefix(int n) {
        uploaded = new int[n + 1];
        longestPrefix = 0;
    }
    
    public void upload(int video) {
        uploaded[video] = 1;
        if (video == longestPrefix + 1) {
            while (uploaded[longestPrefix + 1] == 1) {
                longestPrefix++;
            }
        }
    }
    
    public int longest() {
        return longestPrefix;
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1) for upload and longest on average
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses an array to track uploaded videos and maintains the longest uploaded prefix in a variable. When a video is uploaded, it checks if it extends the current longest prefix and updates accordingly. This ensures constant time operations for both upload and longest.
